misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, is poised to make his eleventh appearance in the esteemed Hector Trophée at the 2026 edition. His consistent presence over a decade has firmly established him as a cornerstone of this unique pair competition, a testament to his enduring commitment to the event.

Throughout his ten previous participations, Simo has demonstrated exceptional collaborative skill, securing the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair on three separate occasions. These victories highlight his formidable capability within the team format, often proving to be a strategic asset to his partners.

While the individual Victor Trophy has thus far remained just beyond his grasp, Simo's pursuit of excellence is unwavering. Known for his candid expressions of emotion on the course, a trait often manifesting in an unfiltered vocabulary, his passion for the game is undeniably potent. This fervent dedication extends to his equipment choices, notably his adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season, signifying a meticulous approach to refining his game.

As he prepares for his eleventh outing, Simo remains an active and vibrant competitor in Hector events. His distinctive blend of competitive fire, strategic acumen in the pair format, and continuous refinement of his craft promises another compelling chapter in his illustrious Hector Trophée journey.
